channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: A tour of the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago
item.description: The Obama Presidential Center opens this week. But it isn't an official presidential library.
item.content:encoded: The Obama Presidential Center opens this week. But it isn't an official presidential library.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: As western fires erupt, Trump's Forest Service says it's now fully staffed
item.description: The Forest Service says it's fully staffed with seasonal firefighters going into summer but there are still questions about whether the government is prepared if major wildfires get out of hand.
item.content:encoded:
The Forest Service says it's fully staffed with seasonal firefighters going into summer but there are still questions about whether the government is prepared if major wildfires get out of hand.

(Image credit: Kirk Siegler)
item.dc:creator: Kirk Siegler

item.title: Here's how much the Iran war cost -- and how its effects will linger
item.description: More than three months after the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, the costs and aftereffects are felt around the world.
item.content:encoded:
More than three months after the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, the costs and aftereffects are felt around the world.

(Image credit: Firdous Nazir)
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley

item.title: Outreach workers weigh the risks of forcing homeless vets to get help
item.description: More than 30,000 US military veterans are homeless. The Trump Administration has promised new housing for vets, but one of Trump's executive orders is targeting homeless people.
item.content:encoded: More than 30,000 US military veterans are homeless. The Trump Administration has promised new housing for vets, but one of Trump's executive orders is targeting homeless people.
item.dc:creator: Quil Lawrence

item.title: Tropical Storm Arthur is the first named storm of the Atlantic hurricane season
item.description: Forecasters say Arthur could generate life-threatening flash floods along the northern Gulf Coast. But it is not expected to strengthen further.
item.content:encoded: Forecasters say Arthur could generate life-threatening flash floods along the northern Gulf Coast. But it is not expected to strengthen further.
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell

item.title: Senate postpones confirmation hearing for intel chief after Trump's call to delay
item.description: Senators wanted to fast-track President Trump's pick for Director of National Intelligence. But Trump now says he wants to delay until they pass voting legislation that already failed in the Senate.
item.content:encoded:
Senators wanted to fast-track President Trump's pick for Director of National Intelligence. But Trump now says he wants to delay until they pass voting legislation that already failed in the Senate.

(Image credit: Chip Somodevilla)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: 'Rejected': How federal prisons stonewall grievances and deny care for years
item.description: People who go to prison keep one important right — to file a grievance over their treatment: from abuse to denied medical care. But in the vast majority of cases, those efforts go nowhere, according to an analysis of federal data by The Marshall Project and NPR.
item.content:encoded:
People who go to prison keep one important right — to file a grievance over their treatment: from abuse to denied medical care. But in the vast majority of cases, those efforts go nowhere, according to an analysis of federal data by The Marshall Project and NPR.

(Image credit: Michelle Mildenberg Lara for The Marshall Project)
item.dc:creator: Christie Thompson

item.title: On a flight home, a stranger helped her understand what came next
item.description: Rebecca Simonitsch had just learned she might be a candidate for brain surgery. The man seated beside her on the flight home pulled out a notebook to explain what lay ahead.
item.content:encoded: Rebecca Simonitsch had just learned she might be a candidate for brain surgery. The man seated beside her on the flight home pulled out a notebook to explain what lay ahead.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kwerel

item.title: El Niño is here, so what does it mean?
item.description: An El Niño has formed amid the warmer-than-normal waters in the tropical Pacific. Now it's a question of how intense the phenomenon will be and where effects like heat and drought will strike.
item.content:encoded:
An El Niño has formed amid the warmer-than-normal waters in the tropical Pacific. Now it's a question of how intense the phenomenon will be and where effects like heat and drought will strike.

(Image credit: Jhojan Hilarion)
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell

item.title: Soccer's premier goal scorers, led by Lionel Messi, show up to the World Cup with a bang
item.description: The World Cup might be less than a week old, but the goal scoring at this year's tourney has been sublime. Argentina's Lionel Messi netted three goals the same day France's Kylian Mbappé scored two.
item.content:encoded:
The World Cup might be less than a week old, but the goal scoring at this year's tourney has been sublime. Argentina's Lionel Messi netted three goals the same day France's Kylian Mbappé scored two.

(Image credit: Roberto Schmidt)
item.dc:creator: Russell Lewis
